generatedArtifacts.tailoredResumeSummary: No uploaded resume was available, so GradLaunch used the saved profile. Focused JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js to match the Tech Lead Full-Stack Rails Engineer role at Mitre Media.
generatedArtifacts.coverLetterExcerpt: I am excited to apply for the Tech Lead Full-Stack Rails Engineer role at Mitre Media, where I can bring my JavaScript, TypeScript, React experience as an aspiring Software Engineer.

shortAnswers.question: Why are you interested in this role?
shortAnswers.answer: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a Software Engineer and uses skills I have already practiced through projects and coursework.

shortAnswers.question: What makes you a match?
shortAnswers.answer: My background in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js closely matches the technical expectations in the job description.
